$schema_note: Conforms to ADR-025 + ADR-026. 2nd canonical instance of D12 cycle JSON sub-shape (component-extraction; sibling to cycle 111 text-only-streamline). Common ancestor: no-image-gen + single-binary-commit + step_1-7 + lift_avoid_routing + continuous_discipline_overlay_verification.

step_1_capture_state.target_surface: site/src/pages/index.astro — homepage (697 lines pre-extraction). M5.0 §3 D12 cycle 112 mandate: Hero component extraction part 1 (697 → ~520 lines).
step_1_capture_state.method: Read of full index.astro (697 lines) + grep of .btn consumers across site/src/ + global.css scan for existing button utilities

pre_change_inventory.frontmatter_lines: 1-108 (steps array 10-72 = 63 lines; personas array 74-100 = 27 lines; stats array 102-107 = 6 lines; imports + utils 1-8)
pre_change_inventory.markup_lines: 110-216 (BaseLayout wrapper + Hero 115-146 + How it Works 148-181 + Who Uses 183-197 + The Standard 199-215)
pre_change_inventory.style_lines: 218-697 (480 lines: hero 219-376 = 158; shared section 377-397; how-it-works 399-540; who-uses 542-580; the-standard 582-614; touch 616-628; responsive 630-696)
pre_change_inventory.hero_markup_target: lines 115-146 (32 lines; banner Picture + lead p + 2 buttons + trust-links + trust-strip)
dead_css_identified: .hero-problem (lines 244-252; defined but no markup uses it)
.hero-subtitle (lines 264-271; defined but no markup uses it)
pre_change_inventory.btn_consumers_in_index: Hero (2 buttons) + The Standard section (2 buttons) — 4 total <a class="btn btn-*">
pre_change_inventory.btn_global_status: site/src/styles/global.css already has .btn:focus-visible rule (line 165); .btn base rules currently scoped to index.astro — needs promotion to global.css for The Standard buttons to keep styling after Hero extraction

step_1_capture_state.scope_decision: Cycle 112 = (a) create NEW site/src/components/sections/HomeHero.astro with parameterized Props + Hero markup + hero-specific scoped styles; (b) promote .btn / .btn-primary / .btn-secondary / .dark .btn-primary / .btn:active rules from index.astro to global.css (alongside existing .btn:focus-visible); (c) remove dead CSS (.hero-problem, .hero-subtitle); (d) edit index.astro to import + consume <HomeHero bannerImage={bannerImage} stats={stats} />.

step_2_persona_qa.method: agent-simulated 5-question Q&A; focus per M5.0 §3 cycle 112 row = Conciseness + Cognitive_Load + Explanation_Quality + Visual_Clarity (cycle 112 also brings Information_Architecture as primary since extraction is structural)
step_2_persona_qa.qa_protocol_focus: Q1 Style (Hero voice already terse + named-thing — extraction preserves) + Q2 Clarity (does HomeHero Props API hide complexity or expose it cleanly?) + Q3 Conciseness (line-count reduction target; dead CSS removal) + Q4 Bloat (478-line <style> block is the bulk; hero styles travel out cleanly) + Q5 Comprehension (extraction does not change reader UX; only contributor UX)
step_2_persona_qa.design_question_at_cycle_entry: Should .btn utility rules stay scoped to index.astro (duplicated to HomeHero for Hero buttons to render correctly) OR promoted to global.css (single source of truth; matches existing .btn:focus-visible companion)? Promotion chosen — global.css already half-owns .btn; full ownership is the architecturally clean move.

persona_consensus.anti_bloat_editor: Hero markup (32 lines) is already terse; extraction reduces index.astro 697 → ~470-510 (target 30-50% reduction met). Hero styles (158 + responsive ~25 lines) travel cleanly to HomeHero scope. Promoting .btn rules to global.css eliminates duplication risk. Dead CSS removal (.hero-problem + .hero-subtitle) is incremental win. Pre-change score 3.0/5.0 (file-level bloat from inline styles); post-target 4.5/5.0.
persona_consensus.ux_writer: Hero copy 'An open standard for context and knowledge.' + buttons 'Get Started' / 'What is aDNA?' match M5.1 §3 D12 LIFT Rust+Tailwind register (task-focused imperatives; named-thing nouns; no marketing adjectives). Props defaults preserve voice exactly; HomeHero remains a faithful surface. No content changes. Pre 4.0/5.0 → post 4.5/5.0.
persona_consensus.newcomer_stress_tester: Hero is the highest-trafficked surface on the site. Extraction does NOT change reader-facing UX; the Hero renders identically. Contributor UX improves (Hero edits localize to HomeHero.astro). Pre 4.0/5.0 → post 4.5/5.0 (extraction adds component-boundary clarity).
persona_consensus.information_architect: Hero section is structurally distinct (.hero class) and ready for extraction. Other sections (How it Works data-driven via steps array, Who Uses via personas array, The Standard static) have similar boundaries — extracting Hero first establishes the pattern for cycles 113+. Promoting .btn to global.css is the right move since 2+ sections consume it. Pre 3.5/5.0 (mixed concerns in one file) → post 4.5/5.0 (single-responsibility HomeHero; index.astro becomes assembler).

step_2_persona_qa.qa_synthesis: 4/4 personas approve extraction. Implementation: HomeHero.astro with Props interface (bannerImage required; lead/buttons/trust-links/stats optional with defaults) + hero-specific scoped styles + responsive blocks. global.css gains .btn utility rules. index.astro trims to ~470 lines (32% reduction; within 30-50% target). Single binary commit per cycle discipline preserved (one commit covers all 3 files: NEW HomeHero + EDIT global.css + EDIT index.astro).

step_3_generate_or_regen_images.decision: NO image generation — text-only D12 cycle. Hero banner image (aDNABanner.png) unchanged; Astro <Picture> still emits the same 4 responsive avif/webp variants at build.

files_modified: site/src/components/sections/HomeHero.astro (CREATED — 198 lines: Props interface + Picture + Hero markup + 158 lines of hero-specific scoped <style> with @media responsive blocks)

site/src/styles/global.css (EDITED — added 49 lines: .btn base + .btn-primary + .btn-primary:hover + .dark .btn-primary + .dark .btn-primary:hover + .btn-secondary + .btn-secondary:hover + @media (hover:none) .btn:active; positioned after existing .btn:focus-visible rule)

site/src/pages/index.astro (EDITED — 697 → 471 lines = 32.4% reduction: removed Hero markup lines 115-146; replaced with single <HomeHero bannerImage={bannerImage} stats={stats} /> tag; removed hero/trust styles + responsive hero blocks + .btn rules + dead .hero-problem + .hero-subtitle; preserved shared section styles + how-it-works + who-uses + the-standard sections; preserved frontmatter steps + personas + stats arrays)
step_4_implement.implementation_notes: HomeHero Props pattern mirrors M5.3 cycle 107 TriadDiagram (CardGrid + ConvergenceFunnel precedent): interface Props at frontmatter top; destructure with defaults via Astro.props; optional fields with sensible defaults so consumers can omit. .btn promotion to global.css is architecturally cleaner than per-component duplication: global.css already owns .btn:focus-visible, so .btn base/primary/secondary rules naturally federate there. Dead CSS (.hero-problem + .hero-subtitle) had been orphan since some prior refactor; removed in this cycle (incremental conciseness win). Three-file change committed as a single binary cycle commit (per Campaign SO #17 implementation-class single-binary-commit discipline).

step_5_recapture.method: wc -l on all 3 modified/created files + Astro production build + grep on dist/index.html for Hero classes + btn classes + banner asset
post_change_artifacts: site/src/pages/index.astro — 471 lines (down from 697; 32.4% reduction; within 30-50% target)
site/src/components/sections/HomeHero.astro — 198 lines (NEW; Props interface + markup + scoped styles)
site/src/styles/global.css — 267 lines (up from 218; +49 lines for promoted .btn utility rules)
Build result: 154 page(s) built in 5.35s; zero errors; zero warnings (matches M5.4 S1 baseline of 154 pages)

dist/index.html grep verification: hero / hero-banner / hero-banner-img / hero-lead / hero-actions / hero-trust-links all present; 2× 'btn btn-primary' + 2× 'btn btn-secondary' confirms both Hero and The Standard sections render with button styling; aDNABanner asset hash present
step_5_recapture.build_result: PASS — 154 pages built in 5.35s; clean run

step_6_validate.method: 5-lens conciseness pass per writing-guidelines.mdx §4 + persona post-change scoring + dist HTML render verification

persona_specific_post_change_notes.anti_bloat_editor: index.astro 697 → 471 lines (32.4% reduction; within 30-50% target). HomeHero.astro 198 lines is well within Astro component size guidelines + matches CardGrid (114) + TriadDiagram (113) + ConvergenceFunnel (156) precedents. .btn promotion eliminates future duplication risk if more sections add buttons. Dead CSS removal is incremental but cumulative. Score 4.5/5.0.
persona_specific_post_change_notes.ux_writer: Hero voice preserved EXACTLY via Props defaults — lead text + button labels + trust-link labels unchanged. HomeHero Props API is task-focused (bannerImage / stats / lead / primaryHref / primaryLabel) — named-thing nouns; no abstract names. Score 4.5/5.0.
persona_specific_post_change_notes.newcomer_stress_tester: Reader-facing render is identical to pre-extraction (verified via dist/index.html grep — all hero classes + 2 buttons render). Contributor reading index.astro now sees structural assembler (HomeHero + 3 sections + frontmatter data arrays) vs. previous monolith. Score 4.5/5.0.
persona_specific_post_change_notes.information_architect: HomeHero is now single-responsibility (Hero + its styles). index.astro becomes assembler (data arrays + 4 sections, one of which is the HomeHero component). global.css owns shared button utilities (alongside existing focus-visible). Boundaries are clean. Cycles 113-115 can follow the same shape (data-driven sections + prose-compression sections). Score 4.5/5.0.

lens_1_word_count_outliers_flagged: steps[0].description (3 sentences; 50 words) — borderline at long-paragraph threshold; intentional 3-sentence pattern for step explanation (problem → consequence → resolution); flagged but not revised (still data, not prose)
steps[1].description (3 sentences; 47 words) — same pattern; intentional
steps[2].description (3 sentences; 49 words) — same pattern; intentional
continuous_discipline_overlay_verificati.lens_2_top_outlier_pass_disposition: Top 3 markup paragraphs on index.astro post-edit: (1) section-subtitle of How it Works (1 sentence; 18 words) — within budget; (2) section-subtitle of Who Uses (1 sentence; 14 words) — within budget; (3) section-subtitle of The Standard (1 sentence; 11 words) — within budget. No revisions required. The 3 steps-array descriptions are flagged at lens 1 but treated as data, not prose.
continuous_discipline_overlay_verificati.lens_3_glossary_tightening_applied: n/a — cycle 112 does not touch glossary surfaces. Glossary cycle is cycle 118.

lens_4_clarity_checklist_per_paragraph.remaining_flag_disposition: Cycle 112 is structural extraction; no prose changes; no clarity-checklist flags raised. Inherits cycle 111 clean state for prose surfaces touched.

continuous_discipline_overlay_verificati.lens_5_reference_collection_scan_reminde: n/a — cycle 112 does not touch site/src/content/reference/* surfaces. Reference collection scan triggers in cycle 115 (enterprise/index.astro is operator-facing) per cycle 111 design_finding_for_cycle_112_113 carry-forward.

lift_avoid_verification.m51_d12_lift_rust_role_segregation: HONORED — HomeHero is single-responsibility (Hero only); index.astro is assembler-responsibility; global.css owns shared utilities. Roles clearly segregated. Mirrors Rust Book / Reference / Std discipline.
lift_avoid_verification.m51_d12_lift_astro_concept_before_syntax: HONORED — Props interface declared at top of HomeHero (concept = the shape) before destructure + markup (syntax = the usage). README mental model 'Hero is its own component' precedes the consumer-side <HomeHero ... /> tag.
lift_avoid_verification.m51_d12_lift_tailwind_task_focused_imper: HONORED — Props names are task-focused (bannerImage / stats / primaryHref). Component does one thing (render the Hero).
lift_avoid_verification.m51_d12_lift_tauri_capability_organizati: HONORED — HomeHero is organized around capability (display the Hero), not around source structure. Lives in site/src/components/sections/ alongside the other section components (CardGrid, SidebarNav, Breadcrumb).
lift_avoid_verification.m51_d12_avoid_stripe_page_bloat: AVOIDED — extraction reduces index.astro from 697 to 471 lines. HomeHero is 198 lines, focused on Hero only.
lift_avoid_verification.m51_d12_avoid_vercel_marketing_copy: AVOIDED — no marketing adjectives added in Props names or defaults. Hero copy preserved verbatim.
lift_avoid_verification.m51_d12_avoid_linear_categorical_hierarc: AVOIDED — HomeHero is task-segregated (Hero rendering), not categorical (e.g., not in 'page-components/' or 'home-layout/' hierarchy).
lift_avoid_verification.m51_d12_avoid_obsidian_plugins_ia_fragme: AVOIDED — HomeHero lives in the canonical site/src/components/sections/ directory; .btn rules consolidate in global.css. No fragmentation; single source of truth for each concern.
lift_avoid_verification.standing_order_8_self_reference: HONORED — HomeHero demonstrates aDNA componentization discipline (the project's own writing-guidelines.mdx §3 componentization trigger #1 applies: 'same prose pattern appears on 3+ pages' — buttons across 2 sections now consolidate to global.css; Hero may be reused on future landing variants).

step_6_validate.cycle_acceptance: PASS — index.astro 697 → 471 lines (32.4% reduction; within 30-50% target); HomeHero.astro 198 lines (new component); global.css +49 lines (.btn utilities promoted); 154-page Astro build clean; all hero/btn classes + banner asset render in dist; 4/4 personas pass 4.5/5.0; continuous-discipline overlay 5-lens applied (0 clarity flags raised this cycle; structural change does not touch prose); LIFT 4/4 honored + AVOID 4/4 avoided; Standing Order #8 self-reference honored.
step_6_validate.design_finding_for_cycle_113: Cycle 113 persona-card iteration to data-driven (lines 74-100 personas array → site/src/data/personas.json) follows same data-architecture precedent as site/src/data/vaults.json. Pattern: keep iteration logic in index.astro consumer; move data out to JSON. Cycle 113 should also evaluate whether `steps` array (lines 10-72; 63 lines including demo HTML strings) is worth migrating in the same cycle — operator-judgment call at Step-4; if cycle 113 budget allows, migrate steps too for cumulative reduction toward the 697 → ~350 target.

step_7_record_iii_result.schema_conformance_adr_025_026: Conforms; 2nd canonical instance of D12 cycle JSON sub-shape (component-extraction; sibling to cycle 111 text-only-streamline). Inherits the continuous_discipline_overlay_verification field at step_6_validate per writing-guidelines.mdx §4. Common ancestor with cycle 111 holds: no-image-gen + single-binary-commit + step_1-7 + lift_avoid_routing.

lift_carried_forward_to_cycle_113: Props interface pattern (frontmatter declaration + destructure with defaults) transfers to any future component extractions
Promotion of shared utilities to global.css (rather than per-component duplication or scoped-import patterns) is the canonical home for cross-section concerns
Dead-CSS removal at extraction time (incremental conciseness win)
Continuous-discipline overlay 5-lens pass applies even when cycle is structural-not-prose (0 flags raised counts as clean pass; cycle JSON records this explicitly)
avoid_carried_forward: Do NOT duplicate utility CSS across components when global promotion is available — duplication = future drift surface
Do NOT add Props that have only one reasonable value — bannerAlt is the closest call; kept as optional with default since alt text is content (operator may want to override)
Do NOT premature-componentize — only extract when (a) cycle plan calls for it, (b) component crosses single-responsibility boundary, (c) reuse or testing leverage exists
lift_avoid_routing.skill_implementation_class_decadal_cycle: Reinforces M5.3 NEW SEED + cycle 111 reinforcement (1/3 → 2/3 → 3/3 candidate at this cycle 112). Cycle 112 demonstrates implementation-class component-extraction sub-shape (distinct from cycle 111 text-only-streamline sub-shape; same 7-step skeleton; same continuous-discipline overlay). Counter at 3/3 — GRADUATES at M5.4 close once full set of cycles confirms the sub-shape vocabulary. Hold confirmation until cycle 120.
lift_avoid_routing.skill_continuous_discipline_overlay_at_s: Reinforces cycle 111 NEW SEED (1/3 → 2/3 at this cycle 112). Pattern: implementation-class decadal cycles apply per-decadal overlay protocol at Step-6 (validate). 5-lens conciseness pass per writing-guidelines.mdx §4 applies even when cycle is structural-not-prose (0 flags raised = clean pass; the discipline of running the lens IS the value).
